logs.roomAudit:
> @workspace/dungeon-rpg@0.0.0 audit:rooms /home/runner/work/DungeonVeil/DungeonVeil/artifacts/dungeon-rpg
> node scripts/validate-all-rooms.mjs && node scripts/validate-production-rooms.mjs && node scripts/validate-spawn-hitboxes.mjs && node scripts/validate-enemy-visibility.mjs && node scripts/validate-mobile-combat.mjs

Room validation passed: 50/50 rooms, prop classes, readable scale, exact collider footprints, portal routes and projectile collision.
  - Rooms 1–20 retain their authored identities and known mobile fixes.
  - Rooms 21–50 use thirty separate compositions without shared boundary templates.
  - Boss arenas keep bounded collider counts and clear authored spawn points.
Production room validation passed: identities, regional differentiation, chase lanes and boss clearances.
Spawn and portal validation passed: all 50 rooms keep solid hero props, full-size enemy hitboxes and safe boss starts.
Enemy visibility audit passed: rooms 14-50, 228 enemy starts, 32 initially occluded starts protected by global line-of-sight, room-ready and attack-marker guards.
Mobile combat audit passed: compact HUD, bounded effects, direct arrows, solid-prop collision guards and the adaptive lightweight world-boss renderer are active.
